body:
Lena, it was great grabbing coffee with you last week — I've been thinking about the conversation we had around the compressed-air storage space ever since. I wanted to follow up because [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) is actively looking at a couple of companies in that segment and I'd love to compare notes before we move deeper into diligence. You mentioned you'd seen a few decks come through [Initialized](orgs/initialized) in the thermal and long-duration storage corridor — any founders there worth a warm intro, or ones we should probably steer clear of? Always valuable to get your read before we commit serious time. Let me know if a quick call this week works on your end.

Amara
